message:
v0.3.7: fix Yellow-pressure rejection deadlock, suppress Green false alarms

3 production machines (vmi1156319/1227854/1149989) stuck at Yellow with
guard drift alarm rejecting ALL candidates even in enforce mode. Root cause:
guard penalty_scale at Yellow was 1.0 (full 50.0), making delete_loss always
exceed keep_loss. Reduced to 0.25 at Yellow, 0.10 at Orange.

Also:
- Suppress prediction notifications at Green pressure entirely (false
  "disk full in 5m" from EWMA spikes when >20% free is pure noise)
- Increase policy rejection log rate-limit from 5min to 30min (stops
  "policy rejected 5/5" flooding journal every scan cycle on stuck machines)
- Add guard status and policy mode to SBH-SUMMARY log line for monitoring

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
